name: Mars: Dread Haulers - A Giga-Truckers Life
description:
**Welcome to Mars: Dread Haulers.**

The colonization of Mars began in 2020. You are one of the legendary First 200 pioneers, among those who dared to step onto the red planet when it was nothing more than a barren, hostile world. Together with your fellow pioneers, you helped build the foundations of life here: the first dome habitats, hydroponic farms, oxygen recyclers, and massive infrastructure to sustain humanity.

You are destined to become an **1st Rat Giga-Trucker**, owner of the largest and longest Giga-Truck in Martian history. With fifteen trailers in tow, your truck is more than a vehicle—it is a moving fortress, the lifeline of Dome Complexes across Mars, and a symbol of power that no Dome Governor can ignore.

By 2024, war erupted on Earth. Transport of new colonists halted abruptly, leaving Mars isolated. The world you helped build became a feudal society. Dome Complexes, governed by ambitious Dome Governors, vie for influence and resources, while Pioneer Domes maintain the backbone of survival across the planet. Trade, power, and survival are intertwined, and those who control the convoys—like you—control life itself.

Drones handle most mechanical labor, giving you freedom to command, negotiate, or assert your will. Politics, feuds, and the struggle for survival are constant—but opportunity waits for the bold. Your choices will define the fate of every Dome, every convoy, and every life under the Martian sky.

**Mars is harsh. Mars is lawless. But it belongs to those daring enough to haul its future across the crimson plains.**

**Your journey begins now.**
creator: Reveniel
